acceptance_criteria.criterion: One section per research insight (8 sections)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Sections titled Insight 1 through Insight 8, each with Research said / Implementation delivers / Gap pattern

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Describes how implementation embodies or deviates from each insight
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Each section explicitly addresses both. Insight 3: 'Gap: This is the widest deviation from research intent'
Dedicated section with 6 enumerated items: learnings capture, context budget measurement, red flags catalog, rewind, hook-based state protection, post-compaction recovery

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Assesses drift toward warned failure modes
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Failure Mode Drift Assessment section with 5-row table mapping each v1 failure mode to current risk level, all rated Low with evidence

dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: All 8 insights assessed plus implementation innovations (6 items), failure mode drift (5 modes), and 5 architectural gap categories

dimensions.name: depth
dimensions.evidence: Distinguishes structural presence from operational wiring. Insight 5: 'Nothing prevents a review agent from having the same context as the implementer'

dimensions.name: sources
dimensions.evidence: Consistent artifact path references: scripts/measure-context.sh, adapters/claude-code/progressive-loading.yaml, hooks/post-compact.sh

dimensions.name: synthesis
dimensions.evidence: Overall verdict: 'The architecture is right; the teeth are missing.' Scorecard synthesizes across 9 dimensions

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.evidence: Gap sections identify concrete needs. Gap B enumerates all 7 steps with artifact validation Yes/No table
